prose:
Property: total electronic energy (optimized)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) in xtb 6.x
Geometry provenance: starting coordinates from user-supplied acetate.xyz; optimized here with ASE BFGS until fmax ≤ 0.05 eV Å⁻¹, 8 steps. This is therefore a fully relaxed GFN2-xTB structure.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge & multiplicity: −1, singlet (multiplicity 1)
Software: xtb backend via chemkit (cli invocation recorded in result JSON)
Convergence: converged = true; n_steps = 8; no engine warnings.
Reproducibility: live log was streamed to the caller’s cwd during the run (…/opt_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out); optimized geometry written to acetate_xtb_opt.xyz and the full JSON result to live.json. Command: `chemkit opt --method xtb --charge -1 --multiplicity 1 acetate.xyz` (see cli_invocation field).

Headline result: total energy = −385.48069 eV

No warnings were returned by the engine.
